global.description: The ad features a minimalist design with abstract shapes and clear text elements promoting a cashback offer.
global.main_message: Promoting cashback offers with a call to action.

elements.label: Light gray background
elements.description: A light gray background that fills the entire canvas, providing a neutral base for the other elements.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping abstract shapes, one circular and one rectangular, in a minimalist style, positioned in the center.

elements.label: Additional abstract shape
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape with a blank interior, positioned slightly off-center, adding to the abstract design.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle located towards the bottom center, serving as a decorative element in the design.

elements.label: Cashback offer text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Earn cashback daily' with a smaller line below it that reads 'Fast signup, instant card', positioned at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The logo 'VaultRun' displayed in a bold font at the top left corner, contrasting against the gray background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now' in bold, located at the bottom center of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with bold text, cashback offer, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main subject is centered, and the body text and CTA are at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, Fast signup, instant card, VaultRun, Watch now
